problem_refined: HR onboarding takes 14 days via manual email and paper. 50 hires/month need Email, Slack, HRIS access on day 1 but provisioning delays average 4 days. Goal: reduce to 2 days with zero access delays.

requirements.text: The system shall automate the employee onboarding workflow end to end.
The system shall provision system access within 4 hours.
requirements.edited_text: The system shall provision all required system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation.

requirements.text: The system shall support 50 concurrent onboarding processes.
The system shall integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack APIs.
requirements.rationale: Day-1 access to all required systems

brd_final:
# Business Requirements Document

## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
This project automates the HR employee onboarding workflow to reduce cycle time from 14 days to 2 days.

## 6. FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS
REQ-001: Automate onboarding workflow end to end.
REQ-002: Provision access within 2 hours.

## 7. NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS
REQ-003: Support 50 concurrent onboarding processes.

## 8. INTEGRATION REQUIREMENTS
REQ-004: Integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack APIs.

user_stories.title: Automate employee onboarding initiation
user_stories.i_want: to initiate the onboarding process through a single interface
user_stories.so_that: I can eliminate manual email processes
acceptance_criteria: Given the HR Manager is on the onboarding interface, when they click 'Start Onboarding', then a new onboarding workflow is initiated.
Given a new onboarding workflow is initiated, when the HR Manager inputs employee details, then the system saves the information correctly.
Given the onboarding workflow is initiated, when the HR Manager views the status, then they see the current progress of the onboarding.
user_stories.notes: Ensure the interface is user-friendly and intuitive.

user_stories.title: Provision system access for new employees
user_stories.i_want: to automatically provision system access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation
user_stories.so_that: new employees can start working without delays
acceptance_criteria: Given an onboarding workflow is initiated, when the system processes the request, then all required system access is provisioned within 2 hours.
Given the system access is provisioned, when the new employee logs in, then they have access to all necessary systems.
Given the system access is provisioned, when the HR Manager checks the status, then they receive a confirmation notification.
user_stories.notes: Monitor the provisioning process for any potential delays.

user_stories.title: Support concurrent onboarding processes
user_stories.i_want: the system to handle 50 concurrent onboarding processes
user_stories.so_that: we can manage the monthly hire volume effectively
acceptance_criteria: Given the system is under load, when 50 onboarding processes are initiated simultaneously, then the system should not crash or slow down significantly.
Given the system is processing 50 concurrent onboarding workflows, when a new onboarding request is made, then it should be queued without errors.
Given the system is handling concurrent processes, when the performance is monitored, then it should meet the defined performance benchmarks.
user_stories.notes: Conduct load testing to ensure system stability.

user_stories.title: Integrate with HRIS, Email, and Slack APIs
user_stories.i_want: to integrate the onboarding system with HRIS, Email, and Slack APIs
user_stories.so_that: notifications and data flow seamlessly between systems
acceptance_criteria: Given the onboarding process is initiated, when the integration is triggered, then the HRIS receives the new employee data.
Given the onboarding process is initiated, when the integration is triggered, then an email notification is sent to the new employee.
Given the onboarding process is initiated, when the integration is triggered, then a Slack message is sent to the team notifying them of the new hire.
user_stories.notes: Ensure all API endpoints are documented and accessible.
